structures.name: Summoning Altar
structures.description:
Offer a Slab depicting a Pal
to summon a powerful Pal to your base.
Adequate caution and battle readiness is paramount.

structures.name: Ancient Furnace
structures.description:
A special furnace based on ancient technology that can smelt all types of ingots.
Materials are melted with fire, then quickly cooled and solidified using ice.
It requires Pals with high-level Kindling and Cooling suitability.

structures.name: Ancient Kitchen
structures.description:
A special kitchen based on ancient technology that can create everything from existing dishes to entirely new recipes.
It retains heat through fire and completes cooking with manual preparation, allowing it to prepare any kind of cuisine.
It requires Pals with high-level Kindling and Handiwork suitability.

structures.name: Ancient Power Generator
structures.description:
A highly efficient power generator restored from lost ancient technology.
It produces massive amounts of electricity, but is prone to overheating while in operation.
It requires Pals with high-level Generating Electricity and any level of Watering suitability.

structures.name: Ancient Farm
structures.description:
A special cultivation device based on ancient technology that harnesses the power of the World Tree to grow all kinds of plants on Palpagos Island.
Smaller than a berry plantation and suitable for indoor placement, it still follows the same cultivation process as standard plots.
It requires Pals with high-level Planting, Watering, and Harvesting suitability.

structures.name: Ancient Material Synthesizer
structures.description:
A special generator based on ancient technology that uses the power of the World Tree to produce all kinds of wood and ore.
Due to its complex structure, only one Pal can be assigned to it.

structures.name: Ancient Relic Recycler
structures.description:
An ancient civilization device that converts materials using repurposed technology from a lost civilization.
It deciphers the technology left within Ancient Relics and refines them into new forms.
A highly specialized facility designed for the efficient use of relics without waste.

structures.name: Ancient Workbench
structures.description:
A Pal-exclusive workbench that is capable of crafting any item in one place.
It cannot be used by the player, and operates at the same speed as a regular workbench.
Due to its advanced equipment, it requires Pals with high-level Handiwork and Medicine Production suitability.

structures.name: Ancient Clinic
structures.description:
A top-tier medical facility that reproduces advanced ancient medical technology.
It offers significantly greater protective capability than a standard clinic.
By assigning a Pal with Medicine Production suitability, even bases with harsh working conditions can maintain the highest level of hygiene.

structures.name: Ancient Diagonal Wall
structures.description:
An angled wall built on triangular foundations to keep out intruders.
Recreates the architectural style of ancient civilizations.

structures.name: Ancient Wall and Door
structures.description:
Door built on a foundation. Becomes an entrance. 
Recreates the architectural style of ancient civilizations.

structures.name: Ancient Fence
structures.description:
Fencing built on foundations and roofs for keeping out intruders. 
Recreates the architectural style of ancient civilizations.

structures.name: Ancient Pal Bed
structures.description:
A ulitmate Pal Bed made from ancient recovery pod with soft matress.
It offers one of the highest SAN recovery rates of all Pal beds, quickly relieving fatigue.
It is the same size as a Large Pal Bed, allowing large Pals to rest comfortably.

structures.name: Ancient Pillar
structures.description:
Column for structural support. 
Recreates the architectural style of ancient civilizations.

structures.name: Ancient Pyramid Roof
structures.description:
A pyramidal roof built on top of walls to keep out the rain and wind.
Recreates the architectural style of ancient civilizations.

structures.name: Ancient Slanted Roof
structures.description:
Slanted roof built on top of walls to keep out the rain and wind. 
Recreates the architectural style of ancient civilizations.

structures.name: Ancient Slanted Triangular Roof
structures.description:
A slanted triangular roof built on top of diagonal walls to keep out the rain and wind.
Recreates the architectural style of ancient civilizations.

structures.name: Ancient Slanted Triangular Roof (Inverted)
structures.description:
An inverted slanted triangular roof built on top of walls to keep out the rain and wind. 
Recreates the architectural style of ancient civilizations.

structures.name: Ancient Hot Spring
structures.description:
A hot spring built with ancient technology, filled with special water infused with Paldium.
It offers the highest SAN recovery of all hot springs and also restores Health.
It is the same size as a standard hot spring, and can fully heal injured Pals.

structures.name: Ancient Triangular Foundation
structures.description:
A triangular foundation for building walls or facilities.
Recreates the architectural style of ancient civilizations.

structures.name: Ancient Triangular Roof
structures.description:
A triangular roof built on top of walls to keep out the rain and wind.
Recreates the architectural style of ancient civilizations.

structures.name: Ancient Corner Roof
structures.description:
A corner roof built on top of walls to keep out the rain and wind.
Recreates the architectural style of ancient civilizations.

structures.name: Ancient Triangular Wall
structures.description:
Triangular wall built on a foundation to keep out intruders. 
Can be used to create create clean, futuristic architecture.

structures.name: Ancient Triangular Wall (Inverted)
structures.description:
An inverted triangular wall built on a foundation to keep out intruders.
Recreates the architectural style of ancient civilizations.

structures.name: Ancient Pal Passage Entrance
structures.description:
An entrance to a Pal passage built on a foundation.
Recreates the architectural style of ancient civilizations.

structures.name: Ancient Wall and Window
structures.description:
Wall with windows, built on a foundation to keep out intruders. 
Recreates the architectural style of ancient civilizations.

structures.name: Ancient Foundation
structures.description:
A foundation for building walls or facilities. 
Recreates the architectural style of ancient civilizations.

structures.name: Ancient Roof
structures.description:
A roof built on top of walls to keep out the rain and wind. 
Recreates the architectural style of ancient civilizations.

structures.name: Ancient Stairs
structures.description:
Stairs placed below a foundation or roof to climb up. 
Recreates the architectural style of ancient civilizations.

structures.name: Ancient Wall
structures.description:
Walls built on foundations to keep out intruders. 
Recreates the architectural style of ancient civilizations.

structures.name: Japanese Paper Lantern
structures.description:
Decorative Paper Lantern.
Perfect for Japanese-style buildings.

structures.name: Arcade Game Cabinet
structures.description:
Decorative arcade machine.
Broken, it can't be played.

structures.name: Red Metal Barrel
structures.description: Decorative red metal barrel.

structures.name: Blue Metal Barrel
structures.description: Decorative blue metal barrel.

structures.name: Green Metal Barrel
structures.description: Decorative green metal barrel.

structures.name: Wooden Barrel
structures.description: Wooden barrel for storing items.

structures.name: Alarm Bell
structures.description:
Bell that sets the alert status for Pals on base.
Change Pal behavior to either attack invading enemies, or focus entirely on work whenever you like.

structures.name: Item Retrieval Machine
structures.description: A device that lets you freely access items from all chests in the base.

structures.name: Monitoring Stand
structures.description:
Command your Pals to work on various things inside a base.
You can allow or prohibit individual kinds of work.

structures.name: High Quality Monitoring Stand
structures.description:
A refined monitoring station with improved materials and structure.
In addition to being able to issue work orders, the system also lowers the SAN cost for Pals working at the base. 
Working conditions are slightly improved, making Pals less likely to become dissatisfied.

structures.name: Ancient Monitoring Stand
structures.description:
A monitoring station based on ancient technology, embedded with Red Paldium.
It issues commands across the entire base through a holographic interface, reducing SAN depletion in Pals.
A special wavelength surrounds the base, keeping Pals calm even in harsh working environments.

structures.name: Palbox Control Device
structures.description:
A remote-access terminal for the Palbox. 
Set it up wherever you'd like and build a base of your own design.

structures.name: Antique Bathtub
structures.description: Decorative antique bathtub.

structures.name: Free Pal Alliance Vertical Banner
structures.description: Decorative Free Pal Alliance Vertical Banner.

structures.name: Free Pal Alliance Standard
structures.description: Decorative Free Pal Alliance Standard.

structures.name: Wooden Bench
structures.description: Decorative wooden bench.

structures.name: Primitive Furnace
structures.description:
Allows refinement of Ingot.
The quality leaves much to desire, and processing is slow.
Requires a Fire Pal to light a flame.

structures.name: Improved Furnace
structures.description:
Allows refinement of Refined Ingot.
The quality has improved, but the processing speed is still unsatisfactory.
Requires a Fire Pal to light a flame.

structures.name: Electric Furnace
structures.description:
Allows refinement of Pal Metal Ingot.
It requires electricity to use, but is quicker to process.
Requires a Fire Pal to light a flame.

structures.name: Gigantic Furnace
structures.description:
Allows refinement of Hexolite.
By growing in size, multiple Pals can collaborate to perform smelting.
Requires a Fire Pal to light a flame.

structures.name: Bonsai
structures.description:
Decorative Bonsai.
Perfect for Japanese-style buildings.

structures.name: Small Container
structures.description: Small container for storing items.

structures.name: Antique Braided Basket
structures.description: Decorative antique braided basket.

structures.name: Cloth Covered Container
structures.description: Cloth covered container for storing items.

structures.name: Wooden Box
structures.description: Wooden box for storing items.

structures.name: Breeding Farm
structures.description:
Assign one male and one female Pal to produce eggs.
Placing Cake in the facility is required for production.

structures.name: Statue of Power
structures.description:
Stone statue spoken of in legends on Palpagos Island.
Offer up Lifmunk Effigy to receive strange powers.

structures.name: Folding Screen
structures.description:
Decorative folding screen.
Perfect for Japanese-style buildings.

structures.name: Cable Reel
structures.description: Decorative cable reel.

structures.name: Campfire
structures.description:
Needed for cooking food.
It can only be used to grill simple ingredients.
Requires a Fire Pal to light a flame.

structures.name: Campfire
structures.description:
Needed for cooking food.
It can only be used to grill simple ingredients.
Requires a Fire Pal to light a flame.

structures.name: Majestic Candlestick
structures.description:
An imposing candlestick lit by the Brothers of the Eternal Pyre and revered as sacred. 
It can be placed on the ground. Requires a Fire Pal to light a flame.

structures.name: Witch Cauldron
structures.description:
Place in base to improve medicine manufacturing speed.
Placing more than one has no additional effect.

structures.name: Ceiling Lamp
structures.description:
A light source that provides illumination to a base even at night.
It can be placed on a ceiling.
Requires electricity, but lights up a larger area.

structures.name: Leather Chair
structures.description: Decorative leather chair.

structures.name: Frog Chair
structures.description: Cute decorative chair.

structures.name: Antique Wooden Chair
structures.description: Decorative antique wooden chair.

structures.name: Wooden Chair
structures.description: Decorative wooden chair.

structures.name: Iron Chair
structures.description: Decorative wooden chair.

structures.name: Antique Green Wooden Chair
structures.description: Decorative antique green wooden chair.

structures.name: Pal Essence Condenser
structures.description:
A chamber for increasing a Pal's rank.
Pals can surpass their physical limitations if given
a concentrated extract taken from a Pal of the same type.

structures.name: Clinic
structures.description:
A basic medical facility for managing the health of Pals working at the base.
Assigning a Pal with Medicine Production suitability helps reduce SAN depletion and prevent illness and injury.
While sanitation has its limits, it plays a crucial role in early base development.

structures.name: Antique Grandfather Clock
structures.description:
Decorative antique grandfather clock.
Broken, it doesn't tell time.

structures.name: Wall Clock
structures.description:
Decorative wall clock.
Broken, it doesn't tell time.

structures.name: Coal Quarry
structures.description:
Facility for producing Coal.
Digging Coal is grueling physical work.
Leave it to a Pal that is good at mining.

structures.name: Drafting Table
structures.description: A facility that lets you combine multiple schematics to create more advanced ones.

structures.name: Free Pal Alliance Flag
structures.description: Decorative Free Pal Alliance flag.

structures.name: Free Pal Alliance Horizontal Banner
structures.description: Decorative Free Pal Alliance horizontal banner.

structures.name: Large Container
structures.description:
Large container for storing items.
Imitates the designs left behind by an ancient and prosperous civilization.

structures.name: Cooking Pot
structures.description:
Needed for cooking food.
Use of a cooking pot allows for a wider variety of meal preparation.
Requires a Fire Pal to light a flame.

structures.name: Cooler
structures.description:
A device that blows cool air, lowering the temperature of a base.
It doesn't provide much relief from the heat, but helps one to endure somewhat hot environments.
Requires an Ice Pal for cooling.

structures.name: Cooler Box
structures.description:
Small food vault.
Assign an Ice Pal to help prevent
food stored inside from spoiling.

structures.name: Cold Food Box
structures.description:
A feeding box that can be kept cold.
Assign an Ice Pal to it and
the food inside will be less likely to spoil.

structures.name: Ore Mining Site
structures.description:
Facility for producing Ore.
Mining Ore is hard work that requires physical endurance.
Leave it to Pals skilled at mining.

structures.name: Ore Mining Site II
structures.description:
Facility for producing large quantities of Ore.
Mining Ore is hard work that requires physical endurance.
Leave it to Pals skilled at mining.

structures.name: Wooden Counter
structures.description: Decorative wooden counter.

structures.name: Crusher
structures.description:
Facility for breaking down Stone and Wood to exchange them for other materials.
Requires Pal with the Watering trait to spin the water turbine.

structures.name: Hexolite Quartz Mine
structures.description:
Facility for producing Hexolite Quartzs. 
Digging Hexolite Quartzs is grueling physical work. 
Leave it to a Pal that is good at mining.

structures.name: Antique Curtain
structures.description:
Decorative antique curtain.
Can be placed on walls.

structures.name: Training Dummy
structures.description:
Training dummy shaped like a Pengullet.
Can only be placed in wide open areas.

structures.name: Feybreak Banner
structures.description: Decorative Feybreak banner.

structures.name: Feybreak Flag
structures.description: Decorative Feybreak flag.

structures.name: Mounted Crossbow
structures.description:
A defensive installation for protecting a base from enemies.
When a Pal with Handiwork suitability is assigned, it will continuously defend the base using a crossbow.

structures.name: Mounted Gatling Gun
structures.description:
A defensive installation for protecting a base from enemies.
When a Pal with Handiwork suitability is assigned, it will continuously defend the base using a gatling gun.

structures.name: Mounted Machine Gun
structures.description:
A defensive installation for protecting a base from enemies.
When a Pal with Handiwork suitability is assigned, it will continuously defend the base using a machine gun.

structures.name: Ancient Turret
structures.description:
An unmanned turret of ancient technology equipped with rocket launcher–level size and firepower.
It requires no ammunition or Pal assignment, and performs fully automated interception using only electricity.
However, despite its immense power, it requires a massive amount of electricity to operate.

structures.name: Mounted Missile Launcher
structures.description:
A defensive installation for protecting a base from enemies.
When a Pal with Handiwork suitability is assigned, it will continuously defend the base using a missile launcher.

structures.name: Sandbag
structures.description:
A defensive installation for protecting a base from enemies.
When a Pal is assigned, it will stop other work and stay on lookout and prepare for combat.

structures.name: Stone Defensive Wall
structures.description:
Massive defensive wall to prevent enemy intrusions.
Made from stone, it is reasonably sturdy.

structures.name: Metal Defensive Wall
structures.description:
Massive defensive wall to prevent enemy intrusions.
Made from metal, it is extremely durable.

structures.name: Wooden Defensive Wall
structures.description:
Massive defensive wall to prevent enemy intrusions.
Made from wood, it breaks easily.

structures.name: Iron Desk
structures.description: Decorative iron desk.

structures.name: Antique Desk
structures.description: Decorative antique desk.

structures.name: Dimensional Pal Storage
structures.description:
A facility for storing a large number of captured Pals. 
Any guild member can deposit or withdraw Pals.
If you set it to private, it can serve as your personal Pal storage.

structures.name: Pal Disassembly Conveyor
structures.description: A dream-like facility that automatically butchers any Pal that is placed inside.

structures.name: Viewing Cage
structures.description:
Container for observing captured Pals.
Pals inside cannot participate in battle or production,
but they do not become hungry.

structures.name: Electric Cooler
structures.description:
A device that blows cool air, lowering the temperature of a base.
Using electricity, it can really lower the temperature.
Requires an Ice Pal for cooling.

structures.name: Power Generator
structures.description:
A power generator fueled by Electric Pals.
Electric equipment won't run without this.

structures.name: Large Power Generator
structures.description:
A power generator fueled by Electric Pals.
Larger and with improved power generation efficiency.

structures.name: Electric Egg Incubator
structures.description:
Device for incubating Pal eggs.
Requires electricity, but automatically keeps the
inside of the incubator at appropriate temperatures.

structures.name: Electric Heater
structures.description:
A device that blows warm air, raising the temperature of a base.
Using electricity, it can really heat things up.
Requires a Fire Pal to light a flame.

structures.name: Electric Kitchen
structures.description:
Needed for cooking food.
It requires electricity to run, but allows a large amount of meals to be prepared rapidly.
Requires a Fire Pal to light a flame.

structures.name: Accumulator
structures.description: A facility for storing excess electricity generated by the Power Generator.

structures.name: Pal Expedition Station
structures.description:
A facility that allows Pals to be sent on expeditions to places like dungeons. 
The dispatched Pals engage in battles and gather items, bringing back resources to the base.

structures.name: High-Quality Workbench
structures.description:
An Assembly Line for producing items and gear.
A small workspace limits production speeds.
Requires Pals that can work with their hands.

structures.name: Production Assembly Line
structures.description:
An Assembly Line for producing items and gear.
By splitting Pals into groups, production speeds have somewhat increased.
Requires Pals that can work with their hands.

structures.name: Production Assembly Line II
structures.description:
An Assembly Line for producing items and gear.
Through clever management, production speeds have greatly increased.
Requires Pals that can work with their hands.

structures.name: Advanced Workshop
structures.description:
An Assembly Line for producing items and gear.
Advanced machinery has been introduced, enabling high-speed production.
Requires Pals that can work with their hands.

structures.name: Gold Coin Assembly Line
structures.description:
An Assembly Line that manufactures Gold Coin.
The work puts a strain on the mind, causing a decrease in Pal's SAN value. 
Requires Pals that can work with their hands.
Warning: building this facility may draw severe scrutiny from the PIDF.

structures.name: Berry Plantation
structures.description:
A farm that can grow Red Berries.
Harvest time is quick, but eating them doesn't provide much sustenance.
Requires a few Pals to plant seeds, water, and harvest the crops.

structures.name: Carrot Plantation
structures.description:
A farm where you can grow Carrot.
It takes time to harvest, but increases the variety of meals you can prepare.
Requires a few Pals to plant seeds, water, and harvest the crops.

structures.name: Lettuce Plantation
structures.description:

structures.name: Tomato Plantation

structures.name: Wheat Plantation
structures.description:
A farm that can grow Wheat.
It requires an average amount of time to harvest.
Requires a few Pals to plant seeds, water, and harvest crops.

structures.name: Skillfruit Orchard
structures.description:
A farm where Skillfruits can be cultivated.
By planting the original fruit in the ground,

structures.name: Great Eagle Statue
structures.description:

structures.name: Fishing Pond
structures.description:

structures.name: Large Fishing Pond
structures.description:

structures.name: Mill

Displays Health, Attack and Defense stats on a scale of 0 to 100.

technology.name: Small Pouch
technology.description:
A small pouch that allows you to carry additional items. 
Holding it increases your inventory slots.
Carrying one is enough.

technology.name: Medium Pouch

Holding it increases your inventory slots.
Carrying one is enough.

Holding it increases your inventory slots.
Carrying one is enough.

Carrying one is enough.

technology.name: Summoning Altar
technology.description:
Offer a Slab depicting a Pal
to summon a powerful Pal to your base.
Adequate caution and battle readiness is paramount.

technology.name: Ancient Armor
technology.description:
Ancient armor forged from Soralite Ingot.
Crafted with the essence of a lost civilization, it boasts overwhelming defensive power and is capable of withstanding cataclysmic threats.

technology.name: Cold-Resistant Ancient Armor
technology.description:
Refined Ancient Armor.
Its cold resistance has been further enhanced using ancient technology, allowing the wearer to maintain their strength even in extreme cold regions.

technology.name: Heat-Resistant Ancient Armor
technology.description:
Refined Ancient Armor.
Its heat resistance has been further enhanced using ancient technology, allowing it to endure scorching environments

technology.name: Lightweight Ancient Armor
technology.description:
Refined Ancient Armor.
It is equipped with ancient auxiliary mechanisms, allowing the wearer to carry more supplies.

technology.name: Ancient Furnace
technology.description:
A special furnace based on ancient technology that can smelt all types of ingots.
Materials are melted with fire, then quickly cooled and solidified using ice.
It requires Pals with high-level Kindling and Cooling suitability.

technology.name: Ancient Kitchen
technology.description:
A special kitchen based on ancient technology that can create everything from existing dishes to entirely new recipes.
It retains heat through fire and completes cooking with manual preparation, allowing it to prepare any kind of cuisine.
It requires Pals with high-level Kindling and Handiwork suitability.

technology.name: Ancient Power Generator
technology.description:
A highly efficient power generator restored from lost ancient technology.
It produces massive amounts of electricity, but is prone to overheating while in operation.
It requires Pals with high-level Generating Electricity and any level of Watering suitability.

technology.name: Ancient Farm
technology.description:
A special cultivation device based on ancient technology that harnesses the power of the World Tree to grow all kinds of plants on Palpagos Island.
Smaller than a berry plantation and suitable for indoor placement, it still follows the same cultivation process as standard plots.
It requires Pals with high-level Planting, Watering, and Harvesting suitability.

technology.name: Ancient Helm
technology.description:
An ancient helmet forged from Soralite Ingot.
It is imbued with wisdom passed down through the ages, protecting its wearer with unwavering strength.
Its defensive capabilities far surpass those of modern equipment.

technology.name: Ancient Material Synthesizer
technology.description:
A special generator based on ancient technology that uses the power of the World Tree to produce all kinds of wood and ore.
Due to its complex structure, only one Pal can be assigned to it.

technology.name: Ancient Relic Recycler
technology.description:
An ancient civilization device that converts materials using repurposed technology from a lost civilization.
It deciphers the technology left within Ancient Relics and refines them into new forms.
A highly specialized facility designed for the efficient use of relics without waste.

technology.name: Ancient Workbench
technology.description:
A Pal-exclusive workbench that is capable of crafting any item in one place.
It cannot be used by the player, and operates at the same speed as a regular workbench.
Due to its advanced equipment, it requires Pals with high-level Handiwork and Medicine Production suitability.

technology.name: Ancient Clinic
technology.description:
A top-tier medical facility that reproduces advanced ancient medical technology.
It offers significantly greater protective capability than a standard clinic.
By assigning a Pal with Medicine Production suitability, even bases with harsh working conditions can maintain the highest level of hygiene.

technology.name: Ancient Structure Set
technology.description:
Set for building bases using ancient architecture. 
Allows building of ancient-styled foundations, walls, ceilings, stairs and other things necessary for shelters.

technology.name: Ancient Pal Bed
technology.description:
A ulitmate Pal Bed made from ancient recovery pod with soft matress.
It offers one of the highest SAN recovery rates of all Pal beds, quickly relieving fatigue.
It is the same size as a Large Pal Bed, allowing large Pals to rest comfortably.

technology.name: Ancient Hot Spring
technology.description:
A hot spring built with ancient technology, filled with special water infused with Paldium.
It offers the highest SAN recovery of all hot springs and also restores Health.
It is the same size as a standard hot spring, and can fully heal injured Pals.

technology.name: Arrow
technology.description:
Arrows for use with bows.
Can be crafted at Primitive Workbench.

technology.name: Fire Arrow
technology.description:
Fire Arrows for use with bows. 
Deals Fire damage on contact.
Can be crafted at Primitive Workbench.

technology.name: Poison Arrow
technology.description:
Poison Arrows for use with bows. 
Afflicts target with Poison on contact.
Can be crafted at Primitive Workbench.

technology.name: Assault Rifle Ammo
technology.description:
Ammo for the Assault Rifle and similar weapons.
Can be crafted at Weapon Assembly Line.

technology.name: Small Feed Bag
technology.description:
A small pouch for holding food. 
Unlocks a food slot in your inventory. 
Players and Pals automatically consume food when hungry.
Carrying one is enough.

technology.name: Average Feed Bag
technology.description:
A decently sized pouch for holding food. 
Unlocks 2 food slots in your inventory. 
Players and Pals automatically consume food when hungry.
Carrying one is enough.

technology.name: Large Feed Bag
technology.description:
A large pouch for holding food. 
Unlocks 3 food slots in your inventory. 
Players and Pals automatically consume food when hungry.
Carrying one is enough.

technology.name: Huge Feed Bag
technology.description:
A extra-large pouch for holding food. 
Unlocks 4 food slots in your inventory. 
Players and Pals automatically consume food when hungry.
Carrying one is enough.

technology.name: Giant Feed Bag
technology.description:
An enormous pouch for holding food.
Unlocks 5 food slots in your inventory. 
Players and Pals automatically consume food when hungry.
Carrying one is enough.

technology.name: Alarm Bell
technology.description:
Bell that sets the alert status for Pals on base.
Change Pal behavior to either attack invading enemies or focus entirely on work whenever you like.

technology.name: Item Retrieval Machine
technology.description: A device that lets you freely access items from all chests in the base.

technology.name: Monitoring Stand
technology.description:
Command your Pals to work on various things inside a base.
You can allow or prohibit individual kinds of work.

technology.name: High Quality Monitoring Stand
technology.description:
A refined monitoring station with improved materials and structure.
In addition to being able to issue work orders, the system also lowers the SAN cost for Pals working at the base. 
Working conditions are slightly improved, making Pals less likely to become dissatisfied.

technology.name: Ancient Monitoring Stand
technology.description:
A monitoring station based on ancient technology, embedded with Red Paldium.
It issues commands across the entire base through a holographic interface, reducing SAN depletion in Pals.
A special wavelength surrounds the base, keeping Pals calm even in harsh working environments.

technology.name: Palbox Control Device
technology.description:
A remote-access terminal for the Palbox. 
Set it up wherever you'd like and build a base of your own design.

technology.name: Metal Bat
technology.description:
A Metal Bat that works well in close combat. 
Use it to beat down anyone you don't like.

technology.name: Cloth Outfit

Clothes made from Cloth. 
Protects against cold nights.

technology.name: Tundra Outfit

Useful for surviving in cold climates.
Can be crafted at Primitive Workbench.

technology.name: Tropical Outfit

technology.name: Pelt Armor

technology.name: Heat Resistant Metal Armor

Can be crafted at Primitive Workbench.

Cheaply made, it isn't very fast.

technology.name: Mega Glider
technology.description:

A mass produced commercial model, it’s decently fast.
Can be made at High-Quality Workbench.

technology.name: Giga Glider
technology.description:
A glider for soaring through the air.
With its capabilities improved, it can soar at high speed.
Can be made at Production Assembly Line

technology.name: Hyper Glider
technology.description:
