Its performance has been further improved, with increased speed and lift.
Can be made at Production Assembly Line II.

technology.name: Gunpowder
technology.description:
Gunpowder used to fire ammunition.
Required to make bullets.
Can be made at High-Quality Workbench.

technology.name: Feathered Hair Band
technology.description:
A beautiful feathered headband. 
Though improbable, it somehow seems to protect its wearer from lethal head injuries.
Can be crafted at Primitive Workbench.

technology.name: Metal Helm
technology.description:
A helm made of metal. 
A reliable piece of armor that protects your head, and all the thoughts within.
Can be crafted at High-Quality Workbench.

technology.name: Refined Metal Helm
technology.description:
A helm made from high quality metal. 
The luster from the polished metal gives the wearer that added boost of confidence.
Can be crafted at Production Assembly Line.

technology.name: Pal Metal Helm
technology.description:
A helm made from Pal Metal Ingot. 
Envied for its immaculate quality, it is proof of a chosen warrior.
Can be crafted at Production Assembly Line II.

technology.name: Plasteel Helmet
technology.description:
Helmet made of Plasteel. 
In addition to enhanced defense capabilities, its weight was also reduced.
Can be crafted at Production Assembly Line II.

technology.name: Pal Metal Axe
technology.description:
An axe for chopping wood. 
It has achieved extraordinary sharpness thanks to Pal Metal. 
It can slice through high-grade trees from the harshest regions without trouble.

technology.name: Wooden Club
technology.description:
A Wooden Club for close range combat.
Can beat a small Pal to a pulp if need be.

technology.name: Bat
technology.description:
Baseball bat for close-range combat.
Might be tough to get a home run with a Pal.

technology.name: Pal Metal Pickaxe
technology.description: A pickaxe for mining. It has achieved extraordinary efficiency thanks to Pal Metal.

technology.name: Sword
technology.description:
Sword for close-range combat. 
The blade is extremely sharp! Mightier than a pen, for sure.
Can be crafted at Weapon Workbench.

technology.name: Assault Rifle
technology.description:
An Assault Rifle that mows down enemies with overwhelming force. 
It excels at rapid-fire and is well suited to taking down powerful foes.
Can be crafted at Weapon Assembly Line.

technology.name: Old Bow
technology.description:
Primitive long-range weapon. 
Hastily put together, it isn't very powerful.
Can be crafted at Primitive Workbench.

technology.name: Three Shot Bow
technology.description:
An enhanced bow that allows three arrows to be fired simultaneously.
By some strange mechanism, it only consumes a single Arrow when fired.

technology.name: Crossbow
technology.description:
Fires an Arrow effortlessly. 
Though it takes time to load, it delivers a powerful shot.
Can be crafted at High-Quality Workbench.

technology.name: Compound Bow
technology.description:
A modernized bow. 
Capable of firing more powerful arrows.

technology.name: FlameThrower
technology.description:
FlameThrower that fires long-range flames. 
Can set the enemy on fire.
Can be crafted at Weapon Assembly Line II.

technology.name: Gatling Gun
technology.description:
A Gatling Gun capable of rapid fire. 
Mows down enemies with suppressive shots.
Can be crafted at Weapon Assembly Line II.

technology.name: Grenade Launcher
technology.description:
Fires grenades that cause wide-ranging explosions. 
Useful when dealing with a large number of enemies.
Can be crafted at Weapon Assembly Line II.

technology.name: Guided Missile Launcher
technology.description:
Fires missiles that automatically track and pursue enemies. 
Missiles explode upon impact, causing damage over a wide area.
Can be crafted at Weapon Assembly Line II.

technology.name: Handgun
technology.description:
A handgun with improved capacity and rapid-fire capabilities.
Has more immediate firepower than a Makeshift Handgun.
Crafted at Weapon Workbench.

technology.name: Homing Sphere Launcher
technology.description:
A launcher for firing spheres. 
Fired spheres home in on Pals.
Can be crafted at Weapon Assembly Line II.

technology.name: Laser Rifle
technology.description:
A weapon that fires high-energy lasers. 
It has impressive firepower and is easy to handle.
Can be crafted at Weapon Assembly Line II.

technology.name: Old Revolver
technology.description:
A slightly outdated revolving handgun. 
Compared to Handgun, it excels in single-shot power.

technology.name: Single-Shot Rifle
technology.description:
A single-shot rifle. Takes time to load.
What it lacks in capacity, it makes up for with sheer power.
Crafted at Weapon Assembly Line.

technology.name: Rocket Launcher
technology.description:
A Rocket Launcher that can fire a powerful round from long distances.
Can be crafted at Weapon Assembly Line II.

technology.name: Semi-Auto Rifle
technology.description:
A rifle that allows for a certain degree of rapid fire. 
It’s easy to aim and has high firepower, making it effective for mid-range combat.

technology.name: Semi-Auto Shotgun
technology.description:
A rapid-fire shotgun with immense power. 
Its close-range damage output is top-notch.

technology.name: Double-Barreled Shotgun
technology.description:
Wreaks havoc at close range. Can fire twice before reloading.
Despite the limited load capacity, it still packs a punch.
Crafted at Weapon Assembly Line.

technology.name: Pump-Action Shotgun
technology.description:
A high capacity, powerful shotgun.
It has outstanding close range DPS.
Can be crafted at Weapon Assembly Line.

technology.name: Scatter Sphere Launcher
technology.description:
A new type of launcher that fires a large number of spheres. 
It can easily capture a herd of Pals.
Can be crafted at Weapon Assembly Line.

technology.name: Single-Shot Sphere Launcher
technology.description:
A launcher that fires spheres. 
It can capture Pals from a greater distance.
Can be crafted at Weapon Workbench.

technology.name: SMG
technology.description:
A submachine gun with exceptional rate of fire. 
It’s easy to handle and effective in close-range combat.

technology.name: Beam Launcher
technology.description:
Fires a high-density beam that causes explosions over a wide area.
Caution is required to prevent overheating during rapid fire.

technology.name: Beam Launcher Ammo
technology.description:
Ammo for the Beam Launcher.
Can be crafted at Ancient Workbench.

technology.name: Beam Sword
technology.description:
Beam Sword for close-range combat.
Slices through opponents, burning them with a high-output laser.

technology.name: Free Pal Alliance Flag Set
technology.description:
Free Pal Alliance Standard and Free Pal Alliance Vertical Banner set. 
Proof of your victory over the Free Pal Alliance.

technology.name: Bio Battery
technology.description:
A device that stores bio-energy as electrical power.
Used for equipment requiring high energy density.
Can be crafted at Production Assembly Line II.

technology.name: Cryogenic Coolant
technology.description:
A high-efficiency cooling medium made from special components derived from Pals.
Used to regulate temperature in high-output devices.
Can be crafted at Production Assembly Line.

technology.name: Gigantic Furnace
technology.description:
Allows refinement of Hexolite.
By growing in size, multiple Pals can collaborate to perform smelting.
Requires a Fire Pal to light a flame.

technology.name: Breeding Farm
technology.description:
Assign a male and a female Pal to produce eggs.
Cake is required for breeding.

technology.name: Primitive Sword
technology.description:
A sword for close-range combat. 
Not bad for a battered sword. 
Perfect for getting up close and personal.

technology.name: Statue of Power
technology.description: Make offerings to enhance the stats of the Player and their Pals.

technology.name: Mushroom Cake
technology.description:
Place it in the chest at a Breeding Farm to make Pals lay a particularly healthy egg.
The talents of the resulting Pals will grow slightly more easily.

technology.name: Vegetable Cake
technology.description:
Place it in the chest at a Breeding Farm to make Pals lay a particularly healthy egg.
Lay eggs twice at once.

technology.name: Extravagant Vegetable Cake
technology.description:
Place it in the chest at a Breeding Farm to make Pals lay a particularly healthy egg.
Mutations are more likely to occur, and talents will grow more easily.

technology.name: Special Cake
technology.description:
Place it in the chest at a Breeding Farm to make Pals lay a particularly healthy egg.
More likely inherit multiple passive skills from their parents.

technology.name: Carbon Fiber
technology.description:
A lightweight yet sturdy material. 
Used to create armor and other equipment.
Can be crafted at Production Assembly Line.

technology.name: Witch Cauldron
technology.description:
Place in base to improve medicine manufacturing speed.
Placing more than one has no additional effect.

technology.name: Ceiling Lamp
technology.description: Lights up dark areas below at a base.

technology.name: Cement
technology.description:
Cement used for creating structures and more.
Can be produced in a High-Quality Workbench.

technology.name: Charge Rifle
technology.description:
A beam rifle crafted with advanced technology.
Charges energy to deliver one powerful shot.

technology.name: Charge Rifle Ammo
technology.description:
Ammo for the Charge Rifle and similar weapons.
Can be crafted at Advanced Weapon Assembly Line.

technology.name: Clinic
technology.description:
A basic medical facility for managing the health of Pals working at the base.
Assigning a Pal with Medicine Production suitability helps reduce SAN depletion and prevent illness and injury.
While sanitation has its limits, it plays a crucial role in early base development.

technology.name: Cloth2
technology.description:
Woven from large amounts of Wool.
Required to create high quality armor.
Can be made at High-Quality Workbench.

technology.name: Drafting Table
technology.description: A facility that lets you combine multiple schematics to create more advanced ones.

technology.name: Computer
technology.description:
A component used in the control of automated equipment and precision machinery.
It's a key component forming the foundation of modern technology.
Can be crafted at Production Assembly Line II.

technology.name: Cooler
technology.description: Cools the nearby area and protects against the heat.

technology.name: Cooler Box
technology.description:
Small food vault.
Assign an Ice Pal to help prevent
food stored inside from spoiling.

technology.name: Cold Food Box
technology.description:
A feeding box that can be kept cold.
Assign an Ice Pal to it and
the food inside will be less likely to spoil.

technology.name: Corrosive Solvent
technology.description:
A dangerous chemical solvent with strong decomposing properties.
Used for precision processing and special treatments.
Can be crafted at Production Assembly Line.

technology.name: Crusher
technology.description:
Facility for breaking down Stone and Wood to exchange them for other materials.
Requires Pal with the Watering suitability to spin the water turbine.

technology.name: Hexolite Quartz Mine
technology.description:
Facility for producing Hexolite Quartzs. 
Digging Hexolite Quartzs is grueling physical work. 
Leave it to a Pal that is good at mining.

technology.name: Training Dummy
technology.description: Training dummy shaped like a Pengullet.

technology.name: Feybreak Flag Set
technology.description:
Feybreak Flag and Feybreak Banner set. 
Proof of your victory over the Feybreak.

technology.name: Decal Gun Set
technology.description:
Decal gun set.
Allows crafting of a strange gun that paints a Pal decal where it is fired.
Required ammo also becomes craftable.

technology.name: Sandbag
technology.description: Pals assigned to it will watch for approaching enemies.

technology.name: Stone Defensive Wall
technology.description: Large defensive wall that protects from enemy invasions.

technology.name: Metal Defensive Wall
technology.description:
Massive defensive wall to prevent enemy intrusions.
Made from metal, it is extremely durable.

technology.name: Wooden Defensive Wall
technology.description:
Massive defensive wall to prevent enemy intrusions.
Made from wood, it breaks easily.

technology.name: Dimensional Pal Storage
technology.description:
A facility for storing a large number of captured Pals. 
Any guild member can deposit or withdraw Pals.
If you set it to private, it can serve as your personal Pal storage.

technology.name: Pal Disassembly Conveyor
technology.description: A dream-like facility that automatically butchers any Pal that is placed inside.

technology.name: Viewing Cage
technology.description:
Container for observing captured Pals.
Pals inside cannot participate in battle or production, but they do not become hungry.

technology.name: Drone Launcher
technology.description:
A launcher that fires drones which perform autonomous attacks.
Capable of deploying up to 9 units, enabling sustained suppression.

technology.name: Stun Baton
technology.description:
Close range weapon that sends out an electric jolt upon contact. 
Pals are easier to capture when electrocuted.
Can be crafted at High-Quality Workbench.

technology.name: Plasma Rifle
technology.description: A rifle that releases an electrical discharge from the point of impact, which chains to multiple enemies.

technology.name: Plasma Rifle Ammo
technology.description:
Ammo for the Plasma Rifle.
Can be crafted at Ancient Workbench.

technology.name: Electric Cooler
technology.description:
Cools the nearby area and protects against the heat.
Improved range and cooling capabilities.

technology.name: Large Power Generator
technology.description:
A power generator fueled by Electric Pals.
Larger and with improved power generation efficiency.

technology.name: Electric Heater
technology.description:
Warms the nearby area and protects against the cold.
Improved range and heating capabilities.

technology.name: Plasma Cartridge
technology.description:
Ammo for the Plasma Cannon and similar weapons.
Can be crafted at Weapon Assembly Line II.

technology.name: Plasma Cannon
technology.description:
Fires high-output energy projectiles. 
Causes an energy explosion upon impact.

technology.name: Energy Shotgun
technology.description:
A shotgun that fires energy rounds.
Excelling in rapid fire, its close-range firepower is truly otherworldly.

technology.name: Energy Shotgun Ammo
technology.description:
Ammo for the Energy Shotgun and similar weapons.
Can be crafted at Advanced Weapon Assembly Line.

technology.name: Accumulator
technology.description: A facility for storing excess electricity generated by the Power Generator.

technology.name: Pal Expedition Station
technology.description:
A facility that allows Pals to be sent on expeditions to places like dungeons. 
The dispatched Pals engage in battles and gather items, bringing back resources to the base.

technology.name: Advanced Workshop
technology.description:
An Assembly Line for producing items and gear.
Advanced machinery has been introduced, enabling high-speed production.
Requires Pals that can work with their hands.

technology.name: Gold Coin Assembly Line
technology.description:
An Assembly Line that manufactures Gold Coin.
The work puts a strain on the mind, causing a decrease in Pal's SAN value. 
Requires Pals that can work with their hands.
Warning: building this facility may draw severe scrutiny from the PIDF.

technology.name: Skillfruit Orchard
technology.description:
A farm where Skillfruits can be cultivated.
By planting the original fruit in the ground,
multiple fruits of the same type can be harvested.

technology.name: Brothers of the Eternal Pyre Flag Set
technology.description:
Brothers of the Eternal Pyre Standard and Brothers of the Eternal Pyre Vertical Banner set. 
Proof of your victory over the Brothers of the Eternal Pyre.

technology.name: High Quality Bait
technology.description:
Bait that lures in Pals. 
Improved from Simple Bait to increase the chances of Pals biting the bait.

technology.name: Deluxe Bait
technology.description:
Bait that lures in Pals. 
Improved to slightly enlarge the size of the bar in the fishing minigame.

technology.name: Alluring Bait
technology.description:
Bait that lures in Pals. 
Improved to enlarge the size of the bar in the fishing minigame and increase the number of items obtained from fishing.

technology.name: Fishing Pond
technology.description:
A ready-to-use fishing pond. 
Assign a Pal to fish here at their own leisure. 
Requires Pals that can work with their hands.

technology.name: Large Fishing Pond
technology.description:
A ready-to-use large fishing pond. 
The expanded body of water makes it possible to catch even larger Pals. 
Requires Pals that can work with their hands.

technology.name: Intermediate Fishing Rod (Cattiva)
technology.description:
A fishing rod designed for catching Pals. 
Use it with bait near water where shadows are visible to start fishing. 
It boasts improved performance, making catches a bit easier.

technology.name: Advanced Fishing Rod (Pengullet)
technology.description:
A fishing rod designed for catching Pals. 
Use it with bait near water where shadows are visible to start fishing. 
It boasts improved performance, making catches vastly easier.

technology.name: Beginner Fishing Set
technology.description:
Beginner-friendly fishing rod and bait set. 
Once you craft both, you'll be able to fish for Pals near bodies of water.

technology.name: Flamethrower Fuel
technology.description:
Ammo for the FlameThrower and similar weapons.
Can be crafted at Weapon Assembly Line II.

technology.name: Mill
technology.description:
Facility for milling Wheat to produce Flour. 
Requires Pal with the Watering suitability to spin the water turbine.

technology.name: Flower Bed
technology.description:
Place in base to improve gathering speed.
Placing more than one has no additional effect.

technology.name: Water Fountain
technology.description:
Place in base to improve watering speed.
Placing more than one has no additional effect.

technology.name: Frag Grenade
technology.description:
A Frag Grenade useful for mid-range combat.
It detonates a few seconds after being thrown, dealing damage to enemies.

technology.name: Dark Grenade
technology.description:
A Dark Grenade useful for mid-range combat.
It detonates a few seconds after being thrown, dealing Dark damage to enemies.

technology.name: Dragon Grenade
technology.description:
A Dragon Grenade useful for mid-range combat.
It detonates a few seconds after being thrown, dealing Dragon damage to enemies.

technology.name: Shock Grenade
technology.description:
A Shock Grenade useful for mid-range combat.
It detonates a few seconds after being thrown, electrocuting everything in the blast radius.

technology.name: Incendiary Grenade
technology.description:
A Incendiary Grenade useful for mid-range combat.
It detonates a few seconds after being thrown, setting the surrounding area on fire.

technology.name: Ground Grenade
technology.description:
A Ground Grenade useful for mid-range combat.
It detonates a few seconds after being thrown, dealing Earth damage to enemies.

technology.name: Ice Grenade
technology.description:
A Ice Grenade useful for mid-range combat.
It detonates a few seconds after being thrown, freezing the surrounding area.

technology.name: Grass Grenade
technology.description:
A Grass Grenade useful for mid-range combat.
It detonates a few seconds after being thrown, dealing Leaf damage to enemies.

technology.name: Frag Grenade Mk2
technology.description:
An improved frag grenade.
It explodes a few seconds after being thrown, dealing massive damage to enemies.

technology.name: Water Grenade
technology.description:
A Water Grenade useful for mid-range combat.
It detonates a few seconds after being thrown, dealing Water damage to enemies.

technology.name: Wooden Living Room Furniture Set
technology.description:
Decorative furniture set.
Place furniture in your living space and enjoy life with your Pals.

technology.name: Barricade Set
technology.description:
Decorative furniture set.
Place to keep somewhere off limits.

technology.name: Traffic Control Set
technology.description:
Decorative furniture set.
No roads mean no traffic control.

technology.name: Road Sign Set
technology.description:
Decorative furniture set.
No roads mean no traffic control.

technology.name: Metal Chair and Desk Set
technology.description:
Decorative furniture set.
Match with metal structures and enjoy life with your Pals.

technology.name: Ironwood Table Set
technology.description:
Decorative furniture set.
Match with metal structures and enjoy life with your Pals.

technology.name: Piano Furniture Set
technology.description:
Decorative furniture set.
Place in your base and dream about living a life of luxury.

technology.name: Antique Mirror Set
technology.description:
Decorative furniture set.
Essentially for making sure you look good.

technology.name: Carpet Set
technology.description:
Decorative furniture set.
Place on a foundation in your base for that homey feel.

technology.name: Antique Couch Set
technology.description:
Decorative furniture set.
Gives the air of luxury to your base.

technology.name: Antique Chair Set
technology.description:
Decorative furniture set.
Use with an antique desk.

technology.name: Wooden Tavern Cabinet Furniture Set
technology.description:
Set of wooden cabinets that look at home in a tavern.
Can store items.

technology.name: Antique Bath Set
technology.description:
Decorative furniture set.
Can't actually be used to stay clean.

technology.name: Antique Storage Set
technology.description:
Antique storage furniture set.
Can store items.

technology.name: Antique Storage Cabinet Set
technology.description:
Antique storage cabinet set.
Can store items.

technology.name: Clock Set
technology.description:
Decorative furniture set.
Doesn't actually tell time.

technology.name: Antique Desk Set
technology.description:
Decorative furniture set.
Use with an antique chair.

technology.name: Bathroom Set
technology.description:
Decorative furniture set.
Can't be used for its original purpose.

technology.name: Amusement Furniture Set
technology.description:
Decorative furniture set.
Your Pals will keep on working.

technology.name: Street Lamp Set
technology.description:
Street lamp set to provide illumination.
Requires electricity to light.

technology.name: Fireplace Set
technology.description:
Brick fireplace set to provide illumination.
Must be lit with fire.

technology.name: Antique Lamp Set
technology.description:
Antique lamp set to provide illumination.
Requires electricity to light.

technology.name: Wooden Tavern Furniture Set
technology.description:
Decorative furniture set.
Set up a bar and enjoy life with your Pals.

technology.name: Metal Shelf Set
technology.description:
Metal shelf set.
Can store items.

technology.name: Outdoor Furniture Set
technology.description:
Decorative furniture set.
Spruces up the outside of your base.

technology.name: Antique High Quality Furniture Set
technology.description:
Decorative furniture set.
Gives an air of stately elegance to your base.

technology.name: Wall-Mounted Houseplant Set
technology.description:
Decorative furniture set.
Place plants on your base's walls for a splash of color.

technology.name: Metal Barrel Set
technology.description:
Decorative furniture set.
Not suitable for doing keg stands.

technology.name: Storage Container Set
technology.description:
Container furniture set.
Can store items.

technology.name: Leather Chair Set
technology.description:
Decorative furniture set.
Leather screams luxury.

technology.name: Emergency Exit Sign Set
technology.description:
Decorative furniture set.
Apparently a priceless artifact in more civilized times.

technology.name: Houseplant Set
technology.description:
Decorative furniture set.
Place plants around your base for a splash of color.

technology.name: Japanese-Style Furniture Set
technology.description:
Japanese-style decorative furniture set.
Transform your base into a traditional Japanese haven.

technology.name: Faux Bamboo Set
technology.description:
A decorative artificial bamboo set.
Use them to create a Bamboo Grove-inspired base.
No materials can be obtained from this structure.

technology.name: Faux Cherry Blossoms Set
technology.description:
A decorative artificial cherry blossom tree set.
Use them to create a Sakurajima-inspired base.
No materials can be obtained from this structure.

technology.name: Faux Desert Greenery Set
technology.description:
A decorative artificial desert tree set.
Use them to create a oasis-inspired base.
No materials can be obtained from this structure.

technology.name: Faux Greenery Set
technology.description:
A decorative artificial tree set.
Use them to create a natural-looking base.
No materials can be obtained from this structure.

technology.name: Faux Crimson Foliage Set
technology.description:
A decorative artificial autumn tree set.
Use them to create a natural-looking base.
No materials can be obtained from this structure.

technology.name: Faux Snowy Greenery Set
technology.description:
A decorative artificial snow-covered tree set.
Use them to create a winte-inspired base.
No materials can be obtained from this structure.

technology.name: Faux Tropical Greenery Set
technology.description:
A decorative artificial tropical tree set.
Use them to create a tropical-inspired base.
No materials can be obtained from this structure.

technology.name: Faux Golden Foliage Set
technology.description:
A decorative artificial yellow autumn tree set.
Use them to create a natural-looking base.
No materials can be obtained from this structure.

technology.name: Corrosive Mist Mask
technology.description:
A mask with a special filtration system. 
Negates damage taken from corrosive mist.

technology.name: Gatling Gun Ammo
technology.description:
Ammo for the Gatling Gun and similar weapons.
Can be crafted at Weapon Assembly Line II.

technology.name: Glass Structure Set
technology.description:
Set for building bases using glass.
Allows building of glass foundations, walls, ceilings, stairs and other things necessary for shelters.

technology.name: Global Palbox
technology.description:
A facility that can store the genetic data of Pals
and allows you to reconstruct them from this data. 
The stored genetic data can also be transferred to other worlds.

technology.name: Grappling Gun
technology.description:
It fires a hook that latches on to distant targets, pulling the user's body towards the target.
It allows for easy movement between places with varying elevation.

technology.name: Mega Grappling Gun
technology.description:
It fires a hook that latches on to distant targets, pulling the user's body towards the target.
Since it's upgraded, it now has greater range.

technology.name: Giga Grappling Gun
technology.description:
It fires a hook that latches on to distant targets, pulling the user's body towards the target.
Using data from prototype versions, its capabilities have been further increased.

technology.name: Hyper Grappling Gun
technology.description:
It fires a hook that latches on to distant targets, pulling the user's body towards the target.
As a result of research, it has achieved overwhelming mobility.

technology.name: Ultra Grappling Gun
technology.description:
It fires a hook that latches on to distant targets, pulling the user's body towards the target. 
With new materials, cooldown time has been significantly reduced.

technology.name: Grenade Ammo
technology.description:
Ammo for the Grenade Launcher and similar weapons.
Can be crafted at Weapon Assembly Line II.

technology.name: Guild Chest
technology.description:
A chest that can instantly send and receive items through subspace. 
The items inside are shared across all bases where it is placed.

technology.name: Hand-Held Torch
technology.description:
Lights up dark areas and keeps you warm. 
Can also be used for close-range combat in a pinch.
Can be crafted at Primitive Workbench.

technology.name: Handgun Ammo
technology.description:
Ammo for the Handgun and similar weapons.
Can be crafted at Weapon Workbench.

technology.name: Tombstone
technology.description:
A gravestone that can be inscribed with text. 
Use it for recording purposes.

technology.name: Heater
technology.description: Warms the nearby area and protects against the cold.

technology.name: High Quality Wooden Board
technology.description:
Fine planks carefully carved from Hardwood.
They have beautiful wood grain and are used for structures with a luxurious feel.
Can be crafted at Production Assembly Line II.

technology.name: Homeward Thundercloud
technology.description:
Transports you to the nearest base.
Cannot be used in dungeons and other similar locations.

technology.name: Large-Scale Stone Oven
technology.description:
Needed for cooking food.
By becoming larger, multiple Pals can cooperate to cook together.
Requires a Fire Pal to light a flame.

technology.name: Rayne Syndicate Flag Set
technology.description:
Rayne Syndicate Standard and Rayne Syndicate Vertical Banner set. 
Proof of your victory over the Rayne Syndicate.

technology.name: Cryogenic Crusher
technology.description:
Facility that crushes Ore and
converts it into other materials.
Requires a power supply and a Pal with Cooling suitability, but it's very efficient.

technology.name: Frostallion Statue
technology.description: Decorative Frostallion statue.

technology.name: Power Generator
technology.description:
Electric Pals at the base can now store electricity,
allowing the use of electric facilities.

technology.name: Circuit Board
technology.description:
Circuit Board required to create precision equipment.
Can be made at Production Assembly Line.

technology.name: Wooden Chest
technology.description:
Used to store items. Place at a base and Pals with
Transport suitability will automatically carry items to it.

technology.name: Metal Chest
technology.description:
Can be used to store more items. Pals with
Transport suitability will automatically carry items to it.

technology.name: Refined Metal Chest
technology.description:
Can be used to store even more items. Pals with
Transport suitability will automatically carry items to it.

technology.name: Nail
technology.description:
Necessary for building various facilities.
Can be made with a Primitive Workbench.

technology.name: Straw Pal Bed
technology.description:
Pals at base recover SAN when sleeping in beds at night.
Without a Pal Bed, Pals cannot sleep soundly, and no SAN is recovered.

technology.name: Fluffy Pal Bed
technology.description: Pals sleep more soundly, improving the amount of Health and SAN recovered while sleeping.

technology.name: Shoddy Bed
technology.description:
Human bed. Sleeping restores Health.
Sleep at night and time will pass until morning.
Cannot sleep unless built under a roof.

technology.name: Fine Bed
technology.description:
Soft bed with improved restorative capabilities.
Cannot sleep unless built under a roof.

technology.name: ItemBooth
technology.description:
A facility for selling items.
By setting products in the sales list, you can sell items to other players.
Assign an Ice Pal to it and the food inside will be less likely to spoil.

technology.name: Advanced Chest
technology.description:
Stores items.
Quite sturdy, with plenty of storage space.
It is useful as a large, secure storage box.

technology.name: Japanese-Style Structure Set
technology.description:
Set for building bases using Japanese-style architecture.
Allows building of Japanese-style foundations, walls, ceilings, stairs and other things necessary for shelters.

technology.name: Jetragon Statue
technology.description: Decorative Jetragon statue.

technology.name: Katana
technology.description:
Katana for close-range combat.
Slices through with razor-sharp precision, cutting cleanly in one strike.

technology.name: Pal Labor Research Lab
technology.description:
A facility for conducting research on the various tasks of Pals. 
By assigning tasks to Pals in this facility, research progresses, granting various benefits.

technology.name: Lamp
technology.description: Lights up dark areas at a base.

technology.name: Hip Lantern
technology.description:
A lantern that can be attached to the hip.
It lights up automatically at night.
You can also switch its lighting mode to keep it on at all times.
Just one is enough to find your way in the dark.

technology.name: Enhanced Hip Lantern
technology.description:
A lantern that can be attached to the hip.
It lights up automatically at night.
You can also switch its lighting mode to keep it on at all times.
Just one is enough to find your way in the dark.

technology.name: Large Ceiling Lamp
technology.description: Lights up large areas below at a base.

technology.name: Large Mounted Lamp
technology.description: Lights up large areas at a base.

technology.name: Energy Cartridge
technology.description:
Ammo for the Laser Rifle and similar weapons.
Can be crafted at Weapon Assembly Line II.

technology.name: Laser Gatling Cartridge
technology.description:
Ammo for the Laser Gatling Gun and similar weapons.
Can be crafted at Weapon Assembly Line II.

technology.name: Laser Gatling Gun
technology.description:
Fires beam-like energy blasts at high speed. 
Its overwhelming firepower can take down multiple enemies at once.

technology.name: Plasma Multicutter
technology.description:
A portable plasma cutter that concentrates and emits plasma energy.
It supports a wide range of uses, from ore excavation to tree cutting.
Its high-output energy also allows for the mining of special ores.

technology.name: Rocket Ammo
technology.description:
Ammo for the Rocket Launcher and similar weapons.
Can be crafted at Weapon Assembly Line II.

technology.name: Meteor Launcher
technology.description:
A phenomenal weapon that fires a meteor. 
Upon striking its target, it creates an explosion similar to a meteorite impact.
Can be crafted at Weapon Assembly Line.

technology.name: Makeshift Assault Rifle
technology.description:
An assault rifle handmade from scraps. 
It excels in rate of fire and long range, but its single-shot power is low.

technology.name: Makeshift Handgun
technology.description:
A handgun created from spare parts.
Relatively well suited for close quarters combat, but can only fire one shot before needing to reload.
Crafted at Weapon Workbench.

technology.name: Makeshift Shotgun
technology.description:
A shotgun handmade from scraps. 
It has a short range but excels in close-range combat

technology.name: Makeshift SMG
technology.description:
A submachine gun handmade from scraps. 
It excels in rate of fire, but its single-shot power is low.

technology.name: Coralum Ingot
technology.description:
An alloy made from Coralum Ore found on the ocean floor. 
Highly resistant to energy, making it ideal for crafting weapons.
Can be refined at Gigantic Furnace.

technology.name: Human-Powered Generator
technology.description:
A facility that converts rotational motion into electrical energy.
The efficiency is low, and the Pals working here will experience a decrease in SAN value, but they will gain experience points.

technology.name: Meat Cleaver
technology.description:
Knife for butchering Pals.
When equipped, the Pet command becomes Butcher.
Butchered Pals will be gone for good.

technology.name: Large Pal Bed
technology.description:
A fluffy bed that Pals can get a good rest on.
Pals can rest on it when injured, or to sleep at night.
Even large Pals can sleep soundly on a bed like this.

technology.name: Pal Pod
technology.description:
A healing pod for Pals.
Used when Pals are injured or to rest at night.
Thanks to technological advancements, the healing amount has increased.

technology.name: Advanced Medicine Workbench
technology.description:
A facility for making medicine to cure Pals' illnesses. 
With advanced technology, it can also create unknown medicines. 
Assign the task to a Pal capable of pharmacy work.

technology.name: Metal Detector
technology.description:
Using this reveals hidden Chromite deposits in dungeons, marking them for easier mining. 
Deposits will become unmarked if you move too far away.

technology.name: Iron Gate
technology.description: Metal gate large enough for big Pals to pass through.

technology.name: Metal Structure Set
technology.description:
Set for building bases using metal.
Allows building of metal foundations, walls, ceilings, stairs and other things necessary for shelters.

technology.name: Mining Cart
technology.description:
Place in base to improve mining speed.
Placing more than one has no additional effect.

technology.name: Missile Ammo
technology.description:
Ammo for the Guided Missile Launcher and similar weapons.
Can be crafted at Weapon Assembly Line II.

technology.name: Ranch
technology.description:
Ranch for raising sheep and fowl-like Pals.
Assign Pals with the appropriate work suitability to the ranch
to automatically produce items.

technology.name: Large-Scale Electric Egg Incubator
technology.description:
Device for incubating Pal eggs.
While power supply is required, it allows multiple eggs to be incubated simultaneously at the optimal temperature.

technology.name: Ancient Hatchery
technology.description:
An advanced breeding facility of ancient civilization technology, enclosed in electronic glass.
It fully automates everything from egg production to incubation at high speed, and increases the inheritance rate of rare skills.
Pals are managed through holograms, it requires minimal pasture space.

technology.name: Large Incubator
technology.description:
Device for incubating Pal eggs. 
It automatically maintains a suitable temperature and can hatch multiple eggs at once.

technology.name: Musket
technology.description:
Simple, old-fashioned gun. 
Fires a single, powerful shot at the expense of a long reload time.
Can be crafted at Weapon Workbench.

technology.name: Moonflower Flag Set
technology.description:
Moonflower Standard and Moonflower Vertical Banner set. 
Proof of your victory over the Moonflowers.

technology.name: ULTRAKILL Collab Set 1
technology.description:
[ULTRAKILL Collab] 
A set containing V1 Armor and Marksman Revolver.

technology.name: ULTRAKILL Collab Set 2
technology.description:
[ULTRAKILL Collab] 
A set containing V2 Armor and Core Eject Shotgun.

technology.name: Crude Oil Extractor
technology.description:
Equipment required to extract Crude Oil from oil fields.
Requires a power supply to operate.

technology.name: High-Pressure Crude Oil Extractor
technology.description:
A device that pumps and extracts Crude Oil from deep underground.
It can produce Crude Oil even in areas without oil fields, but it can only be placed on open ground with no structures beneath it.
It requires a far greater supply of electricity than the Crude Oil Extractor.

technology.name: Flame Cauldron
technology.description:
Place in base to improve fire-making speed.
Placing more than one has no additional effect.

technology.name: Pal Surgery Table
technology.description: A facility where surgery can be performed on Pals to change their gender or passive skills.

technology.name: Overheat Rifle
technology.description:
An assault rifle capable of firing endlessly without reloading.
Prolonged bursts cause overheating, leaving you exposed.
Use with caution.

technology.name: Overheat Rifle Ammo
technology.description:
Ammo for the Overheat Rifle and similar weapons.
Can be crafted at Advanced Weapon Assembly Line.

technology.name: Palbox
technology.description:
Facility for storing captured Pals.
Pals inside gradually recover Health.
The area around this structure will become your base.

technology.name: Flea Market (Pals)
technology.description:
A facility for selling Pals.
By setting Pals in the sales list, you can sell them to other players.
Assign an Ice Pal to it and the food inside will be less likely to spoil.

technology.name: Boost Gun
technology.description:
Firing this at a Pal in your team temporarily boosts that Pal's attack and defense. 
Firing it at an enemy deals damage instead.

technology.name: Boost Gun Ammo
technology.description:
Ammo for the Boost Gun and similar weapons.
Can be crafted at Weapon Workbench.

technology.name: Megaboost Gun
technology.description:
Firing it at an allied Pal boosts their attack and defense, while hitting an enemy deals damage. 
Thanks to improvements, the boost is stronger and lasts longer, and it deals more damage to enemies.

technology.name: Feed Box
technology.description:
Place food here, and Pals at the base
will eat from it.

technology.name: Pal Recovery Grenade
technology.description:
A Frag Grenade with healing effects.
It bursts on impact, restoring HP to allied Pals.

technology.name: Medicine Rack
technology.description: A shelf for storing medicine. Sick Pals will come here to take their medicine. Be sure to keep the medicine stocked.

technology.name: Revival Potion
technology.description: A potion that revives a Pal that has been injured and is unable to move.

technology.name: Sol Sphere
technology.description:
An item that captures Pals when thrown.
A high-grade Sphere from an ancient civilization that secured coexistence with Pals.

technology.name: Ancient Sphere
technology.description:
A tool that captures Pals when thrown.
An ultimate Sphere created as the pinnacle of an ancient civilization, imbued with the power of the World Tree.

technology.name: Exotic Sphere
technology.description:
An item that captures Pals when thrown.
Boasting incredible performance, it can capture Pals that fall outside regular standards.

technology.name: Plasteel
technology.description:
Plasteel created by processing Crude Oil and metal.
Can be produced in a Electric Furnace.

technology.name: PIDF Flag Set
technology.description:
PIDF Standard and PIDF Vertical Banner set. 
Proof of your victory over the PIDF.

technology.name: Polymer
technology.description:
Polymer made from refined oil. 
Required for producing various advanced items such as firearms.
Can be crafted at Production Assembly Line.

technology.name: Advanced Recovery Meds
technology.description:
Medicine that heals wounds over time.
Extremely high quality, it rapidly restores HP before your eyes.

technology.name: Wooden Board
technology.description:
Planks made from processed wood for easier use.
More versatile than raw logs, with a wide variety of uses.
Can be crafted at Primitive Workbench.

technology.name: Stone Axe
technology.description:
An axe for cutting wood.
Made from stone, it's not very sharp.

technology.name: Metal Axe
technology.description:
A metal axe capable of cutting down even hard trees.
Effective against the sturdy trees that grow deep within the continent.
Can be crafted at High-Quality Workbench.

technology.name: Refined Metal Axe
technology.description:
An axe that can gather Hardwood from trees found in harsh environments such as deserts and volcanic areas.
Can be crafted at Production Assembly Line.

technology.name: Coal Quarry
technology.description:
Facility for producing Coal.
Digging Coal is grueling physical work.
Leave it to a Pal that is good at mining.

technology.name: Campfire
technology.description:
Used to make simple food
or provide meager warmth and light.

technology.name: Cooking Pot
technology.description: Can efficiently prepare more varieties of foods.

technology.name: Electric Kitchen
technology.description:
Needs electricity but can prepare high-quality food more efficiently.
Requires Pal with Emitflame suitability.

technology.name: Ore Mining Site
technology.description:
Facility for producing Ore.
Mining Ore is hard work that requires physical endurance.
Leave it to Pals skilled at mining.

technology.name: Ore Mining Site II
technology.description:
Facility for producing large quantities of Ore.
Mining Ore is hard work that requires physical endurance.
Leave it to Pals skilled at mining.

technology.name: High-Quality Workbench
technology.description:
Produces faster than Primitive Workbench.
Requires Pal with Handcraft trait.

technology.name: Production Assembly Line
technology.description:
Needs electricity but produces items at a faster pace.
Requires Pal with Handcraft trait.

technology.name: Production Assembly Line II
technology.description:
Needs electricity but produces items at an even faster pace.
Requires Pal with Handcraft trait.

technology.name: Berry Plantation
technology.description:
Can produce berries at a base. Requires Pal with
Seeding, Watering, and Collectresourcepickable suitabilities.

technology.name: Carrot Plantation
technology.description:
A farm where you can grow Carrot.
It takes time to harvest, but increases the variety of meals you can prepare.
Requires a few Pals to plant seeds, water, and harvest the crops.

technology.name: Lettuce Plantation
technology.description:
Farm for producing lettuce.
Requires Pal with Seeding, Watering, and Collectresourcepickable suitabilities.

technology.name: Onion Plantation
technology.description:
A farm where you can grow Onion.
It takes time to harvest, but increases the variety of meals you can prepare.
Requires a few Pals to plant seeds, water, and harvest the crops.

technology.name: Potato Plantation
technology.description:
A farm where you can grow Potato.
It takes time to harvest, but increases the variety of meals you can prepare.
Requires a few Pals to plant seeds, water, and harvest the crops.

technology.name: Tomato Plantation
technology.description:
Farm for producing tomatoes.
Requires Pal with Seeding, Watering, and Collectresourcepickable suitabilities.

technology.name: Wheat Plantation
technology.description:
Use it to grow ingredients for Bread.
Requires Pal with Seeding, Watering, and Collectresourcepickable suitabilities.

technology.name: Primitive Furnace
technology.description: Uses Ore to produce Ingots.

technology.name: Improved Furnace
technology.description: Uses Ore and Coal to produce Refined Ingots.

technology.name: Electric Furnace
technology.description: Allows refinement of Pal Metal Ingot.

technology.name: Medieval Medicine Workbench
technology.description:
Can produce simple medicine.
Requires Pal with Productmedicine trait.

technology.name: Electric Medicine Workbench
technology.description:
Needs electricity but can produce higher-quality medicine.
Requires Pal with Productmedicine trait.

technology.name: Stone Pickaxe
technology.description:
A pickaxe used for mining.
Made from stone, the efficiency is questionable.

technology.name: Metal Pickaxe
technology.description:
A pickaxe used for mining. 
Made from metal, its durability and efficiency have improved.
Can be crafted at High-Quality Workbench.

technology.name: Refined Metal Pickaxe
technology.description:
A pickaxe used for mining. 
Its durability and efficiency have further improved.
Can be crafted at Production Assembly Line.

technology.name: Pure Quartz Quarry
technology.description:
A facility for producing Pure Quartz. 
Mining Pure Quartz is grueling physical work.
Leave it to Pals skilled at mining.

technology.name: Logging Site
technology.description:
Can produce wood at a base.
Requires Pal with Deforest suitability.

technology.name: Logging Site II
technology.description:
Facility for producing Hardwood. 
Cutting wood is hard work that requires much physical endurance. 
Leave it to Pals skilled in logging.

technology.name: Stone Pit
technology.description:
Can produce stone at a base.
Requires Pal with Mining suitability.

technology.name: Sulfur Quarry
technology.description:
Facility for producing Sulfur.
Digging Sulfur is grueling physical work.
Leave it to a Pal that is good at mining.

technology.name: Weapon Workbench
technology.description:
Produces simple mechanical weapons.
Requires Pal with Handcraft suitability.

technology.name: Weapon Assembly Line
technology.description:
Needs electricity but produces weapons and ammunition at a faster pace.
Requires Pal with Handcraft trait.

technology.name: Weapon Assembly Line II
technology.description:
Needs electricity but produces weapons and ammunition at an even faster pace.
Requires Pal with Handcraft trait.

technology.name: Pal Gear Workbench
technology.description:
Produces items that allow Pals
to use Partner Skills.

technology.name: Refrigerator
technology.description:
Large food vault.
Assign an Ice Pal to help prevent
food stored inside from spoiling.

technology.name: Reinforced Arrow
technology.description:
Enhanced arrows for shooting with 
Compound Bow.
Can be crafted at Primitive Workbench.

technology.name: Repair Bench
technology.description: Repairs damaged weapons and tools.

technology.name: Rifle Ammo
technology.description:
Ammo for the Single-Shot Rifle and similar weapons.
Can be crafted at Weapon Workbench.

technology.name: Coarse Ammo
technology.description:
Ammo for the Musket, Makeshift Handgun, and similar weapons.
Can be crafted at Weapon Workbench.

technology.name: Hexolite Armor
technology.description:
Armor made of Hexolite.
Possesses overwhelming durability and defense.

technology.name: Cold Resistant Hexolite Armor
technology.description:
Improved Hexolite Armor.
Useful for surviving in cold climates.

technology.name: Heat Resistant Hexolite Armor
technology.description:
Improved Hexolite Armor.
Boasts high heat resistance.

technology.name: Lightweight Hexolite Armor
technology.description:
Improved Hexolite Armor.
Increases carrying capacity.

technology.name: Advanced Arrow
technology.description:
Enhanced arrows for shooting with 
Advanced Bow.
Can be crafted at Primitive Workbench.

technology.name: Advanced Bow
technology.description:
A bow reconstructed with advanced technology. 
Capable of firing extremely powerful arrows.

technology.name: Hexolite Helmet
technology.description:
Helmet made of Hexolite.
Combines incredible strength and lightness.

technology.name: Futuristic Structure Set
technology.description:
Set for building bases using futuristic architecture. 
Allows building of futuristic foundations, walls, ceilings, stairs and other things necessary for shelters.

technology.name: Powerful Fishing Magnet
technology.description:
A high-powered magnet used in advanced salvage operations. 
Its strong magnetic pull can retrieve resources and supplies from the ocean floor.

technology.name: Alpha Wave Generator
technology.description:
A device that emits alpha waves to help Pals relax.
Slows the rate at which the SAN value of Base Pals decreases.
Placing more than one has no additional effect.

technology.name: PAL Genetic Research Unit Flag Set
technology.description:
PAL Genetic Research Unit Standard and PAL Genetic Research Unit Vertical Banner set. 
Proof of your victory over the PAL Genetic Research Unit.

technology.name: Common Shield
technology.description:
Strange shield made with Paldium technology.
It automatically repair itself after not taking damage for a while.

technology.name: Mega Shield
technology.description:
Strange shield made with Paldium technology.
The new model has been improved, enhancing its defense.
Can be made at High-Quality Workbench.

technology.name: Giga Shield
technology.description:
Strange shield made with Paldium technology.
Modifications have enhanced its effectiveness even further.
Can be made at Production Assembly Line.

technology.name: Hyper Shield
technology.description:
Strange shield made with Paldium technology.
Through repeated testing, the highest quality has been achieved.
Can be made at Production Assembly Line II.

technology.name: Ultra Shield
technology.description:
Strange shield made with Paldium technology.
As a result of further experiments, ultimate quality has been achieved.
Can be made at Production Assembly Line II.

technology.name: Ancient Shield
technology.description:
A shield created using lost ancient technology.
It automatically repairs itself after not taking damage for a while. 
Its performance is said to be impossible to reproduce in the modern era.

technology.name: Advanced Shield
technology.description:
Strange shield made with advanced technology.
It automatically repairs itself after not taking damage for a while.

technology.name: Shotgun Shell
technology.description:
Ammo for shotguns and other similar weapons.
Can be crafted at Weapon Workbench.

technology.name: Sign
technology.description: Can be written on.

technology.name: Silo
technology.description:
Place in base to improve planting speed.
Placing more than one has no additional effect.

technology.description: Saddle for safely riding Melpaca.

technology.name: Kitsun Saddle
technology.description: Saddle for safely riding Kitsun.

technology.name: Kitsun Noct Saddle
technology.description: Saddle for safely riding Kitsun Noct.

technology.name: Nyafia's Shotgun
technology.description:
A shotgun for Nyafia to hold.
Activate its Partner Skill, and Nyafia will unleash a barrage of shotgun blasts at nearby enemies.

technology.description: Saddle for safely riding Vanwyrm.

Activate its Partner Skill, and Lifmunk

technology.name: Tocotoco's Gloves
technology.description:
Gloves for gently holding Tocotoco.
Activate its Partner Skill to hold Tocotoco
and use it to fire explosive eggs.

technology.description:
Assault rifle made specifically for Tanzee.
Activate its Partner Skill, and Tanzee will enter gunner mode
and begin shooting at nearby enemies.

technology.name: Tanzee Ignis's Assault Rifle
technology.description:
Assault rifle made specifically for Tanzee Ignis.
Activate its Partner Skill, and Tanzee Ignis will enter gunner mode
and begin shooting at nearby enemies.

technology.name: Pal Dressing Facility
technology.description:
Pal Dressing Facility.
Give your Pals a new look!
Skins obtained inside and outside the game can be applied here!

technology.name: Heavy Assault Rifle
technology.description:
Ammo for the Heavy Assault Rifle.
Can be crafted at Ancient Workbench.

technology.name: Heavy Assault Rifle Ammo
technology.description:
Ammo for the Heavy Assault Rifle.
Can be crafted at Ancient Workbench.

technology.name: Laser Sword
technology.description:
A Beam Sword made from Soralite Ingots. 
A close-range weapon that instantly cuts targets using its high-output energy blade.

technology.name: Mechanical Bow
technology.description:
A bow crafted from Soralite Ingots.
With greatly enhanced initial velocity and piercing power, this high-precision weapon excels at ranged combat.

technology.name: Mechanical Bow Ammo
technology.description:
Enhanced arrows for shooting with Mechanical Bow.
Can be crafted at Ancient Workbench.

technology.name: Tactical Grenade Launcher
technology.description:
Ammo for the Tactical Grenade Launcher.
Can be crafted at Ancient Workbench.

technology.name: Tactical Grenade Launcher Ammo
technology.description:
Ammo for the Tactical Grenade Launcher.
Can be crafted at Ancient Workbench.

technology.name: Azure Covenant Flag Set
technology.description:
Azure Covenant Flag and Azure Covenant Banner set. 
Proof of your victory over the Azure Covenant.

technology.name: Soralite Quarry
technology.description:
Facility for producing Soralite.
Digging Soralite is grueling physical work.
Leave it to a Pal that is good at mining.

technology.name: Prototype Shotgun
technology.description:
Ammo for the Prototype Shotgun.
Can be crafted at Ancient Workbench.

technology.name: Prototype Shotgun Ammo
technology.description:
Ammo for the Prototype Shotgun.
Can be crafted at Ancient Workbench.

technology.name: Combat SMG
technology.description:
Ammo for the Combat SMG.
Can be crafted at Ancient Workbench.

technology.name: Combat SMG Ammo
technology.description:
Ammo for the Combat SMG.
Can be crafted at Ancient Workbench.

technology.name: Soralite Ingot
technology.description:
An ancient metal refined from ore that slumbers in Sunreach. 
A rare processed material, forming the foundation of high-grade equipment and structures.
Can be refined at Ancient Furnace.

technology.name: Snowman
technology.description:
Place in base to improve cooling speed.
Placing more than one has no additional effect.

technology.name: Hot Spring
technology.description: Pals recover SAN while in a Hot Spring.

technology.name: High Quality Hot Spring
technology.description: Pals recover plenty of SAN while in the hot spring.

technology.name: Japanese-Style Hot Spring
technology.description:
Facility where Pals on base can rest. 
Its calming, traditional Japanese design offers an extra boost to SAN recovery.

technology.name: Stone Spear
technology.description:
Useful for close-range combat.
Its length allows you to stand further away when attacking.

technology.name: Metal Spear
technology.description:
Useful for close-range combat. 
The metal tip gives it increased attack power.
Can be crafted at High-Quality Workbench.

technology.name: Refined Metal Spear
technology.description:
Useful for close-range combat. 
The high-quality metal tip gives it increased attack power.
Can be crafted at Production Assembly Line.

technology.name: Lily's Spear
technology.description:
The spear cherished by Lily.
Punishes those who neglect their Pals.

technology.name: Enhanced Lily's Spear
technology.description:
An enhanced version of Lily's beloved spear. 
Pierces those who neglect their Pals.

technology.name: Electric Egg Incubator
technology.description:
Device for incubating Pal eggs.
Requires electricity, but automatically keeps the
inside of the incubator at appropriate temperatures.

technology.name: Egg Incubator
technology.description: Place a Pal Egg inside to incubate it.

technology.name: Pal Essence Condenser
technology.description:
Combines several Pals of the same type
to create a higher-ranked version.

technology.name: Pal Sphere
technology.description:
An item that captures Pals when thrown.
This basic model is only effective on low level Pals.

technology.name: Mega Sphere
technology.description:
An item that captures Pals when thrown. 
Its capabilities have been improved, allowing it to catch a wider range of Pals.
Can be crafted at Sphere Workbench.

technology.name: Giga Sphere
technology.description:
An item that captures Pals when thrown. 
Able to capture moderately powerful Pals.
Can be crafted at Sphere Workbench.

technology.name: Hyper Sphere
technology.description:
An item that captures Pals when thrown. 
Enhanced capabilities allow it to capture even more powerful Pals.
Can be crafted at Sphere Assembly Line.

technology.name: Ultra Sphere
technology.description:
An item that captures Pals when thrown. 
Not many Pals can escape its highly efficient design.
Can be crafted at Sphere Assembly Line II.

technology.name: Legendary Sphere
technology.description:
An item that captures Pals when thrown. 
Very few Pals can escape its perfected design.
Can be crafted at Sphere Assembly Line II.

technology.name: Ultimate Sphere
technology.description:
An item that captures Pals when thrown. 
Almost no Pals can escape its flawless design.
Can be crafted at Sphere Assembly Line II.

technology.name: Sphere Workbench
technology.description:
Produces Spheres for capturing Pals.
Requires Pal with Handcraft suitability.

technology.name: Sphere Assembly Line
technology.description:
Creates Pal Spheres at a faster pace.
Requires Pal with Handcraft suitability.

technology.name: Sphere Assembly Line II
technology.description:
Creates Pal Spheres at an even faster pace.
Requires Pal with Handcraft suitability.

technology.name: Advanced Sphere Assembly Line
technology.description:
An Assembly Line for producing spheres used for capturing Pals.
Advanced machinery has been introduced, allowing for the production of spheres at high speed.
Requires Pals that can work with their hands.

technology.name: Curve Module
technology.description:
Equipping it causes the sphere to spin with a curved trajectory. 
It becomes easier to catch Pals off guard, and increases capture power.

technology.name: Slider Module
technology.description:
Equipping it adds a slider spin to the sphere. 
The sphere curves at a sharp angle, making it easier to catch Pals off guard and increasing capture power.

technology.name: Heavy Weight Module
technology.description: Equipping it makes the sphere heavier, reducing its range but increasing its capture power.

technology.name: Homing Module
technology.description: Equipping it makes the sphere home in on Pals, further increasing capture power.

technology.name: Sniper Module
technology.description: Equipping it increases the sphere's range, allowing it to sharply capture Pals and enhancing capture power.

technology.name: Sniper Module II
technology.description: Equipping it significantly increases the sphere's range, allowing it to sharply capture Pals and enhancing capture power.

technology.name: Hexolite
technology.description:
An alloy of Chromite and Hexolite Quartz. 
Used for building advanced equipment and structures.
Can be refined at Gigantic Furnace.

technology.name: Stone Gate
technology.description: Stone gate large enough for big Pals to pass through.

technology.name: Stone Structure Set
technology.description:
Set for building bases using stone.
Allows building of stone foundations, walls, ceilings, stairs and other things necessary for shelters.

technology.name: Stump and Axe
technology.description:
Place in base to improve logging speed.
Placing more than one has no additional effect.

technology.name: Nutrient Tonic
technology.description:
A nutrient-rich Nutrient Tonic that prevents hunger for a period of time. 
A concentrated, flavorful blend of nutrients ideal for long journeys.

technology.name: Tidy Table Set
technology.description: A neat decorative table set for building a clean and well-kept base.

technology.name: Antique Dresser
technology.description:
Dresser useful for giving yourself a remake.
Allows players to edit their appearance.

technology.name: Thermal Core
technology.description:
A high-temperature reaction core containing vast thermal energy.
Used as a power component in advanced devices.
Can be crafted at Production Assembly Line II.

technology.name: Large Toolbox
technology.description:
Place in base to improve handiwork speed.
Placing more than one has no additional effect.

technology.name: Mounted Torch
technology.description: Place it at a base to light the surrounding area.

technology.name: Electric Pylon
technology.description:
Place in base to improve electricity generating speed.
Placing more than one has no additional effect.

technology.name: Bear Trap (Small)
technology.description:
Immobilizes those who step on it.
Only effective on small Pals or humans.

technology.name: Bear Trap (Large)
technology.description:
Immobilizes those who step on it.
Only effective on large Pals.

technology.name: Mine
technology.description: Automatically detonates when stepped on.

technology.name: Electric Mine
technology.description:
Electrocutes those who step on it.
Electrocuted Pals are easier to capture.

technology.name: Ice Mine
technology.description:
Freezes those who step on it.
Frozen Pals are easier to capture.

technology.name: Hanging Trap
technology.description:
Catches Pals that pass through.
Only effective on small Pals and humans.

technology.name: Extra Weapon Holster
technology.description:
A holster that allows an additional weapon to be equipped.
While in possession, it increases weapon equip slots by 1.
Carrying one is enough.

technology.name: Extra Weapon Holster 2
technology.description:
A holster that lets you equip additional weapons.
When in inventory, adds an extra weapon slot.
Carrying one is enough.

technology.name: Lockpicking Tool v1
technology.description: No key? No problem! These tools will allow you to try and pry open any treasure chest that would normally require a Copper Key.

technology.name: Lockpicking Tool v2
technology.description: No key? No problem! These tools will allow you to try and pry open any treasure chest that would normally require a Silver Key.

technology.name: Lockpicking Tool v3
technology.description: No key? No problem! These tools will allow you to try and pry open any treasure chest that would normally require a Gold Key.

technology.name: WallSignboard
technology.description:
A signboard to write on.
Can be hung on walls.

technology.name: Wall Torch
technology.description: Place it on a wall to light the surrounding area.

technology.name: Aquatic Construction Kit
technology.description:
Construction kit that allows foundations
to be placed on water.

technology.name: Advanced Weapon Assembly Line
technology.description:
An Assembly Line for producing weapons and ammunition.
Advanced machinery has been introduced, enabling high-speed weapon production.
Requires Pals that can work with their hands.

technology.name: Beam Scatter
technology.description:
A specialized beam weapon for close-range combat.
It fires compressed energy in a wide, scattering blast.

technology.name: Beam Scatter Ammo
technology.description:
Ammo for the Beam Scatter.
Can be crafted at Ancient Workbench.

technology.name: Wing Pack
technology.description:
A portable glider that enables flight. 
Consumes Wing Cell to propel the user through the skies.

technology.name: Wing Cell
technology.description: The fuel required to power the Wing Pack.

technology.name: Wooden Gate
technology.description: Wooden gate large enough for big Pals to pass through.

technology.name: Wooden Structure Set
technology.description:
Set for building bases using wood.
Allows building of wooden foundations, walls, ceilings, stairs and other things necessary for shelters.

technology.name: Ladder
technology.description: A ladder that allows you to climb to a slightly higher place.

technology.name: Beta Wave Generator
technology.description:
A device that emits beta waves to energize Pals.
Increases the work speed of Base Pals.
Placing more than one has no additional effect.

technology.name: Primitive Workbench
technology.description:
Primitive Workbench for producing simple items.
Pals with Handcraft suitability help
speed up production.

technology.name: Paloxite Ingot
technology.description:
An indomitable alloy created by fusing Soralite and Paloxite.
A highly rare material, crystallizing the technology of ancient civilization and the power of the World Tree.
It is vital for crafting the highest-grade equipment and structures.

technology.name: Meowmere
technology.description:
[Tides of Terraria]
According to the legend, this sword was brought back from a distant land by Croajiro.
Why? We have no idea...
Fires a bouncing cat projectile with each swing to attack enemies.
